CHUBB COMMERCIAL INSURANCE
Policy Endorsement — Change of Limit

This endorsement changes the policy. Please read it carefully.

-----------------------------------------------------------------
POLICY NUMBER:                CHB-CF-2024-55810
NAMED INSURED:                Pinnacle Warehousing Trust
POLICY PERIOD:                09/01/2024 - 09/01/2025
ENDORSEMENT NUMBER:           003
ENDORSEMENT EFFECTIVE DATE:   04/01/2025
-----------------------------------------------------------------

In consideration of the additional premium set forth below, IT IS AGREED that:

1. The Declarations page is amended to reflect the following change:

   CHANGE TYPE:          Change of Limit
   AFFECTED COVERAGE:    Blanket Building Limit (commercial property)
   AFFECTED FIELD:       blanket_building_limit
   PRIOR VALUE:          $45,000,000
   NEW VALUE:            $53,000,000
   INCREASE:             $8,000,000

2. No other term, condition, or limit of the policy is altered by this
   endorsement.

3. Additional Premium — fully earned at endorsement effective date:

   ADDITIONAL PREMIUM:   $12,450.00
   TAXES/FEES:           (as set forth on the endorsement invoice, separately billed)
   TOTAL DUE:            $12,450.00 + applicable taxes and surcharges

-----------------------------------------------------------------
Page 1 of 2
-----------------------------------------------------------------

REASON FOR ENDORSEMENT:
Insured has completed construction and occupancy of a new 62,000 sq ft
warehouse facility at the Indianapolis IN location, previously scheduled as
'under construction' in the prior SOV. Post-completion appraisal supports
an $8M increase to the blanket building limit to maintain 100% replacement-
cost coverage.

ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE POLICY REMAIN UNCHANGED.

Countersigned:

   _____________________________        _____________________________
   Underwriter (Chubb)                  Producer of Record
   Sandra Morales                       Midwest Commercial Brokerage
   Date: 03/28/2025                     Date: 03/29/2025

Chubb Commercial Insurance
436 Walnut Street, Philadelphia, PA 19106
commercial.endorsements@chubb.com

Page 2 of 2
